inputs.srepr: Mul(Rational(4, 3), pi, Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True, real=True), Integer(3)), Symbol('rho', positive=True, real=True))

output.srepr: Mul(Rational(8, 15), pi, Symbol('Omega', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True, real=True), Integer(5)), Symbol('rho', positive=True, real=True))

method: J_z = I_z * Omega, I_z = (2/5) M R^2 for uniform sphere
